Package index

Picks

Define hierarchical data selections

picks() datasets() variables() values()
Choices/selected settings

Choices/selected helpers

Utility functions

is_categorical() experimental
tidyselect helpers

Shiny Modules

Interactive UI components for picks

picks_ui() picks_srv()
Interactive picks

Resolution

Resolve delayed and dynamic choices

resolver()
Resolve picks
determine()
A method that should take a type and resolve it.

Merge

Merge datasets based on picks selections

merge_srv()
Merge Server Function for Dataset Integration
tm_merge()
Merge module

Conversion

Convert from teal.transform objects

as.picks() teal_transform_filter() experimental
Convert data_extract_spec to picks

Developer utilities

check_last_level() assert_last_level()
